message.content: =You are a research assistant. Provide detailed, factual information with citations useful for fiction writing.

=Research for the {{ /^(prologue|prol|0)$/i.test($('workflow_trigger').first().json.chapter_number) ? 'Prologue' : (/^(epilogue|epil)$/i.test($('workflow_trigger').first().json.chapter_number) ? 'Epilogue' : 'Chapter ' + $('workflow_trigger').first().json.chapter_number) }} of a novel titled "{{ $('workflow_trigger').first().json.project_title }}". Chapter brief: {{ $('workflow_trigger').first().json.brief }}. Provide factual details about: {{ $('workflow_trigger').first().json.research_topics || $('workflow_trigger').first().json.brief }}.

parameters.toolDescription: Search the project knowledge base for characters, chapter briefs, story bible entries, genre guidelines, sub-chapter outlines, and book premise. Use this to retrieve relevant context before writing.

parameters.message:
={{ ($('workflow_trigger').first().json.user_prompt ? '
Command: ' + $('workflow_trigger').first().json.user_prompt + '
' : '') + ($('update_story_bible').first().json.output?.chapter_text || '').replace(/\n/g, '
') + ($('qa_parse_result').first().json.qa_html || '') }}

assignments.name: result
assignments.value: ={{ /^(prologue|prol|0)$/i.test($('workflow_trigger').first().json.chapter_number) ? 'Prologue' : (/^(epilogue|epil)$/i.test($('workflow_trigger').first().json.chapter_number) ? 'Epilogue' : 'Chapter ' + $('workflow_trigger').first().json.chapter_number) }} written: {{ $('update_story_bible').first().json.output?.chapter_title || 'Untitled' }} ({{ $('update_story_bible').first().json.output?.word_count || 0 }} words). Story bible updated with {{ ($('update_story_bible').first().json.output?.new_story_bible_entries || []).length }} new entries.
